domains.name: Terse-Output Directive Propagation
domains.description: Extend passive references to terse-output.md across all load-bearing contexts, then inject the runtime directive at skill write-sites and Agent() prompts. Upgrade enforcement from WARNING to BLOCKER after coverage lands.

domains.name: Input Compression and Boilerplate Dedup
domains.description: Wave-2 author-time compression of the remaining SAFE reference.md files and 12 research docs. Extract redundant agent-prompt boilerplate into a single shared fragment imported by the 7 UNSAFE reference.md files.

domains.name: Output Format Specialization and Intensity Gating
domains.description: Absorb the caveman-review line-level finding format into sprint-review. Persist output_intensity in developer-profile.json. Add per-section LITE exemption markers to 9 safety/reasoning-sensitive skills (supersedes task-type-gating's whole-skill approach). Document the activity-feed message length rule.

domains.name: UI/UX Continuous Audit
domains.description: Cross-page semantic consistency, data-quality, interactive-element coverage, analytics-event drift, per-role audit matrix, and UI/UX heuristics. Sibling to blitz:browse; read-only.
